---
title: "Gonçalo F. Matos"
about:
    template: jolla
    image: ./images/profile.jpeg
    links:

        - icon: journals
          text: U-Shift research group
          href: https://ushift.tecnico.ulisboa.pt/team-goncalo-matos/ 
          target: _blank

        - icon: github
          text: GitHub
          href: https://github.com/gmatosferreira
          target: _blank

        - icon: bookmark-check-fill
          text: ORCID
          href: https://orcid.org/0009-0001-3489-1732
          target: _blank

        - icon: linkedin
          text: LinkedIn
          href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/goncalofmatos/
          target: _blank
format:
  html:
    css: /styles/index.css
---

# Hi, I'm Gonçalo!

I am a programmer who is interested in writing (not only code), mobility and equality. 

I have a master's degree in Transportation Systems at Instituto Superior Técnico (University of Lisbon), where I continue to explore the transportation world, assisting U-Shift urban mobility lab on their research projects.

# 💻🛤️🌍
